# Thepla House by Tejal's Kitchen

> Junk the Junk Food.

Thepla House by Tejal's Kitchen is a 100% vegetarian, home-style Gujarati cloud-kitchen
brand in Mumbai, founded by Tejal in 2018. We cook ghar ka khana — theplas, thalis, farsan
and sweets — and deliver it fresh across Mumbai.

## The promise
- 100% whole-wheat atta — no maida, ever
- Sunflower oil only — never palm oil
- No preservatives and no artificial colours
- Jain and vegan options, clearly tagged on every menu
- Made fresh after order

## What we make
250+ home-style Gujarati dishes across theplas & rotis, thalis, farsan & snacks, sweets and
seasonal specials. Signature items include methi thepla, the Gujarati thali, khaman dhokla,
khandvi, handvo, undhiyu and mohanthal.

## Where we cook (7 kitchens across Mumbai)
- Chandivali (Andheri East) — flagship kitchen; catering and travel packs
- Kalina (Santacruz East)
- Lower Parel (Senapati Bapat Marg)
- Mulund (Mulund West)
- Thane (Manpada)
- Navi Mumbai (Airport / Sanpada)
- Kandivali (Kandivali West) — dine-in outlet

## How to order
- Swiggy and Zomato (delivery)
- WhatsApp / call: +91 98195 55065
- Most kitchens open Mon–Sun, 9am–10pm

## Services
- Catering for events and pooja, with full Jain menus
- Travel packs: vacuum-packed methi thepla, fresh for 7+ days; made to carry, customers take them across India and abroad (we don't ship — buy at any kitchen)
- Franchise enquiries: Mr. Dhaval Shah, +91 98 33 44 3014, Dhaval@theplahouse.com

## Links
- Website: https://theplahouse.com
- Menu: https://theplahouse.com/menu
- Locations: https://theplahouse.com/locations
- Instagram: @tejals_kitchen
